# What

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate`, `npm test`, and `npm run format:check` pass locally.
- [ ] Any template change keeps the pack single-column and ATS-safe (system fonts, pt-only sizes at or above 10pt, no images or tables or webfonts, accent out of body copy).
- [ ] Preview PNGs are regenerated if a template changed.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] No personal data is included (no real CV content in templates, previews, or examples).
- [ ] Documentation is updated if user-facing behavior changed.
